channel.title: southernadventures1
channel.description: God First✝️ Custom Treehouse Builder southadvs@gmail.com YT channel below 👇

item.title: This Treehouse Has Faster Internet Than YOUR House. Wait until t...
item.description:
View on TikTok


This Treehouse Has Faster Internet Than YOUR House. Wait until the end and see how INSANELY fast this internet is. Premium Treehouse Wifi. Maybe the best treehouse wifi out there!
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction #tinyhouse

item.title: Will it work? Read Below ⬇️ I think that this Is the best co...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Will it work? Read Below ⬇️ I think that this Is the best compromise, nothing was going above the toilet anyway and now I can easily access my filters to service. Plus the water pump is a smart pump and is supposed to detect water flow and push consistent pressure to every fixture. And it has settings you can adjust the PSI so I want it accessible. Theres going to be a 3 stage filter system on this treehouse Sediment Filter - This goes before the pump and gets rid of any dirt, sand, rust, or rock dust that comes up from the well 2 Stage Filter - This is will filter out any unwanted things like microplastics or taste from the PVC plumbing underground, but it will not filter out the healthy minerals from the earth. UV Filter - This one is probably not necessary, as the well is over 300 feet deep and its unlikely theres any harmful bacteria down there, especially since I’ve already been drinking from it here and there, but might as well. After this filter the water will flow into all copper piping. With this setup, we will we have clean and healthy water, full of minerals but not toxins, and we will also have strong and consistent pressure even this high up.
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction

item.title: He may have only had one arm but he made up for it by being the ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


He may have only had one arm but he made up for it by being the camera man. Which also allowed him to receive immunity Another day, another think knocked off the treehouse to-do list. I met with septic guys today, internet its getting installed tomorrow, and meeting with propane guys later this week. (Yeah I changed my mind have to do some propane to take load off the solar.)
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #tinyhouse #construction #fyp

item.title: BUNKER BUILD INCOMING! From 30 feet up to 10 feet under… but f...
item.description:
View on TikTok


BUNKER BUILD INCOMING! From 30 feet up to 10 feet under… but first, gotta finish the treehouse. Shooting for December—gonna be tight!" #
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #bunker

item.title: One overset staple, one cut wire, can cause as short that could ...
item.description:
View on TikTok


One overset staple, one cut wire, can cause as short that could burn down the whole house. It’s not that it’s super complicated, you just need to be very careful and meticulous when doing this. This is the best of both worlds!
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction

item.title: I have no doubt in my mind that the Lord was watching over us. W...
item.description:
View on TikTok


I have no doubt in my mind that the Lord was watching over us. What if had fell when my brother was on the ladder? Or what if he had been behind the ladder and it kicked his feet out? He was about to climb up after me. What if the ladder hit the dogs on the first story? It came close enough to scare them into screaming. What if It had tipped sideways instead of gone backwards? What if I hadn’t caught onto the knee brace? I would’ve fallen 15 foot onto the “ice” as a best scenario. Or I could’ve landed on top of the ladder. My point is theres 50 different ways this could’ve ended up a lot worse than a sore and scraped up arm. But, God.
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #foryoupage #build #construction #tinyhouse

item.title: Its was a 50 foot drop. I’ve climbed this ladder hundreds of t...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Its was a 50 foot drop. I’ve climbed this ladder hundreds of times, and the last time I ever do it this happens..One “last” tour was almost literal. Thankfully instinct kicked in…So grateful to God for protecting my brother and I, and the 3 dachshunds that were down below. Part two will reveal what happened, my injuries, and the aftermath. Follow & Stay tuned.
#treehouse #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #fyp #foryoupage

item.title: Whos Petunia? Where does she come up with these things? Unfortun...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Whos Petunia? Where does she come up with these things? Unfortunately the mics stopped picking up audio halfway through this video, but now you can really see how much of a difference good audio quality makes in a video. To me it’s painful to watch with the all the background noise and crappy audio. Sorry about that guys and gals, we’ll be fixed up in the next video.
#treehouse #build #fyppppppppppppppppppppppp #construction #fyp

View on TikTok
